raw: This pass admits up to 4 people at a 50% discount on tickets to the Museum's Exhibit Halls. Children under 3 are always admitted for free. 1. Your Library pass can only be used on the date printed on the pass. 2. Please bring your library pass confirmation (printed or displayed on a phone). 3. When you arrive at the Museum, stop at the Box Office to exchange your library pass and purchase Exhibit Hall tickets at the discounted rate. If you have any questions or would like to reserve your Exhibit Hall passes in advance, please call 617-723-2500 (9:00 a.m. - 5:00 p.m. daily).
